_meta.description: Glass PDK key results summary for machine-readable consumption
_meta.note: All results are computational. No fabricated hardware.

headline_results.claim: Glass interposers are 2-4x cheaper than silicon CoWoS at volume
headline_results.methodology: Multi-source pricing comparison including full process costs
headline_results.validation: 5 commercial glass suppliers (Corning, Schott, AGC, Borofloat, Fused Silica)
headline_results.confidence: HIGH -- validated against published industry data
headline_results.caveat: Range depends on volume tier, glass type, and process complexity

headline_results.claim: Bi-Metallic Shell reduces thermomechanical stress by 25x
headline_results.validation: Closed-form analytical calculation with published material properties
headline_results.confidence: HIGH -- analytical solution, no numerical approximation
headline_results.caveat: Assumes ideal cylindrical geometry; real vias have taper and roughness

headline_results.claim: BEM solver achieves 0.35% error vs analytical
headline_results.methodology: Comparison of BEM Z0 against coaxial cable analytical formula
headline_results.confidence: HIGH -- standard BEM verification against known analytical result
headline_results.caveat: Accuracy demonstrated for ideal circular coaxial geometry only

headline_results.methodology: Generative exploration of 41,700 candidates with physics + patent + TRL filtering
headline_results.validation: Each design verified for Z0 = 50 +/- 5 Ohm, safety factor > 1, TRL > 4
headline_results.confidence: HIGH -- deterministic generation with fixed random seed
headline_results.caveat: Patent risk assessment is computational, not legal opinion

headline_results.claim: Glass has 10x better thermal stability than organic substrates
headline_results.confidence: HIGH -- based on published CTE and dielectric temperature coefficients
headline_results.caveat: Comparison is for impedance drift only, not total system performance

headline_results.methodology: Train/test split on BEM-generated dataset with physics-constrained loss
headline_results.confidence: MEDIUM -- inherits BEM solver limitations; not validated against experimental data
headline_results.caveat: Valid only within trained design space region

headline_results.methodology: 10,000 Latin Hypercube samples with Centered Probability optimization
headline_results.caveat: Actual manufacturing distributions may differ from assumed Gaussians
